[Please encode this action according to the following action coding standard.]

[Please output the encoding according to five dimensions: FORCE, ARM, HAND, VD, HD]

[FORCE: The amount of force applied to the object when performing the action]

[5 = very strong, 4 = strong, 3 = moderate, 2 = weak, 1 = very weak]

[ARM: The initial state of the arm before the action begins]

[HAND: The initial height where the hand rests before the action begins]

[0 = ground level, 1–9 = relative height between ground level and the performer's height, 10 = performer's height, 11 = one unit above, 12 = two units above]

[VD: The primary vertical direction of hand movement during the action]

[HD: The primary horizontal direction of hand movement during the action]

[All variables must output integer encoding values.]

[Output only a single JSON object.]
